column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Thank you ,you prove over and over how much we mean to you .God bless you and your family.

Lakewood ranch is just getting HAMMERED.
Will Not stop, we just keep getting fed rain and slapped, feed rain and slapped
same in Treasure Island. Relentless
Same in mid-town Sarasota. We’ve been battling it all night.
same in Parrish
Still crazy windy at this time in the morning. Unbelievable thanks for all the updates
It actually just quieted down here in the last 30 minutes (Parrish/Palmetto/Ellenton area). It was SO loud and now it's a lot quieter and way less windy.
Lakewood ranch has been getting slammed. Worst I’ve ever seen it since we lived here. Thank you for keeping us informed!!
Seems like more rain than IAN!!
absolutely! I wasn’t expecting this
definitely
Thank you Dennis for keeping us informed on what's going on in our area you're the best
Forceful winds, rain during night...still continuing this morning...thankful we have power...
New Port Richey is getting hammered.
yes. It's raining like crazy here still. Called into work since I drive to St Pete early from NPR.
I drive to Tampa. Waiting for my job to say stay home…. Wishful thinking.
stay safe out there.
~~ Quiet and no rain at this moment in 580/McMullenB area.
It’s terrible in Bartow!

I’ve made coffee enough for one, there’s none for tornado. 👋😂
Parrish here, I think that’s where you arrow points.
Thank you for your constant updates throughout this storm !! No sleep for you and your team !
Are the warnings based off of radar indicated rotation?
it's been steady rain and windy for several hours. Not extremely terrible though. I've been without power since 745 last night.

sorry you’ve been without power but glad to hear it hasn’t been terrible! Up here though in TN, a warning is issued when rotation has been spotted and there’s very likely a tornado on the ground, sirens start going off and the weather stations track the path street by street urging people to get in their safe places and providing times for when the tornado may be tracking over them… I’ve seen dozens of warnings issued down there, but haven’t seen any coverage for them like the kind we get up here
it's different here for sure. We don't get sirens, but get warning on our phones if you've set it up for them. And you can turn on news channels or radio for updates.
Good morning Denis Phillips ..u must be exhausted 😩. Winds n rain are tremendous in holiday, no way I'm driving in this..school system is open.. crazy people, stay safe everyone 🙏
Springhill area getting hammered with heavy rain and winds
We got rough weather South of Bradley junction right now
getting hit hard here in duette
I know.
we will probably be without electricity a long time
bowling green getting pounded to right now..

Lakewood ranch is just getting hammered!
Will Not stop, we just keep getting rain and slapped, rain and slapped!
Is the Tampa International Airport still operating?
our daughter just took off from Newark to Tampa, so looks like they are accepting inbounds (unless they divert back - they did that last night after getting halfway here) 🙏🏻
are you flying today
the airport is operating but flights will most likely be delayed or canceled. You have to check with the airlines themselves
This is really bad. I'm in Sunset Beach and this tree came down. Just got home from work.. The winds have been crazy all night
Been up all night. Parrish has been in a constant band for 24hrs! Crazy rain totals!
same. I have probably slept an hour total. Why does this seem so much worse than ian?

me too. And I just said the same thing about Ian. Our power finally went at 2am and turned the baby’s sound machine off so I could really hear it all then. It’s been crazy and I’m a floridian of 30 years lol
me too it has been awful. I agree rain feels so much worse than Ian!
It still isnot leaving Nokomis!!! Been here since yesterday morning at 7:30. Thundering more than ever.
ABC Action News wasn’t telling me anything
Went to sleep around 3am, woke up a few min ago at 5am and power out. As I was lighting candles, power back on. Brew coffee now!
I need a reliable weatherman for Marion County please!! I need to know what's going on here.
I agree, we have nobody to listen to in marion county.
that's fine and dandy but knowing this area specifically would be great! An overall picture is not helpful.
I use the live radar on my phone app and it’s really accurate. I’m in Ocala, and we should be clear of the bands in another hour. The wind will linger
Is it even possible to get to 104 6th S street Bradenton from St. Pete, Clearwater airport ?
Long night no sleep thank you Denis Phillip you keep me from panicking alot
Are we expecting the storm surge before, or after the storm passes by?
It’s been crazy as hell in Valrico / Brandon near Dover. Lord have mercy.
I hope you get some rest soon

Morning ⛈️
Thank you for the updates
Lithia?
